title: INCOME-QUALIFIED BILL DISCOUNT PROGRAM - 211info
text: PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC INCOME-QUALIFIED BILL DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an ongoing monthly discount between 15% and 80% on PGE bills. The discount applies in addition to any other assistance received. 121 SW Salmon Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Low-income households at or below 60% State Median Income (SMI) Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-7pm (503) 228-6322 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 228-6322 Main phone (800) 542-8818 Toll-free Customer Service Main phone (503) 228-6322 Customer Service Toll-free (800) 542-8818 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: Phone: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement Website: English, Spanish, Arabic, Burmese, Chinese, Farsi, Japanese, Korean, Rohingya, Romanian, Russian, Somali, Swahili, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Discounted Electric Service Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC UTILITIES - PUBLIC SAFETY POWER SHUTOFFS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC
